name: Kwan Pha Yao Golf Course
source_notes: Phayao province, Northern Thailand. 'Kwan' (กว๊าน) is Northern Thai dialect for a large natural lake — Kwan Phayao is the main freshwater lake in Phayao city. Course listed in aggregate directories but no hole count, fees, phone, or designer data found. Province is Phayao (~667 km from Bangkok). May be 9-hole provincial course.
